articles.title: Luke Kennard first 10 games as a Laker
articles.original_title: Luke Kennard first 10 games as a Laker
articles.summary: Lowkey… Luke Kennard has been really solid. Through his first 10 games as a Laker he’s averaging 10.1 PPG on 75.1 TS% and shooting 50% from three on 2.8 attempts a game. Every time he’s out there the spacing just feels better. He’s not forcing anything, he moves the ball, and if he's open he'll drain 3s lights out. The shooting alone changes how defenses play us. Just feels like he’s earned a longer look and what him as a starting SG looks like.    submitted by    /u/Zestyclose-Dra
